sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Your merciful love, O God, we have received in the midst of your temple. Your praise, O God, like your name, reaches the end of the earth; your right hand is filled with saving justice.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Let all the earth cry out to God with joy

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Let the peace of Christ control your hearts; let the word of Christ dwell in you richly.

sections.title: The Summons
sections.author: Kelvingrove
sections.snippet: Will you come and follow me If I but call your name? Will you go where you don’t know And never be the same? Will you let my love be shown, Will you let my name be known, Will you let my life be grown In you and you in me?

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed the man who seeks refuge in him.

sections.title: Bread of Heaven
sections.author: Jesse Manibusan and Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Bread of heaven, Savior broken, cup of life outpoured; We your people thirst and hunger. Come renew us, Lord; Come renew us, Lord.

sections.title: Drawn to You
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Drawn to you, Lord, we are drawn to you, to the beauty of your presence in this place. Here for you, God, we are here for you as the gifts we bring become a feast of grace. We are drawn to you.

sections.title: Your Grace Is Enough
sections.author: Matt Maher
sections.snippet: Great is your faithfulness, O God; you wrestle with the sinner's restless heart. You lead us by still waters into mercy, and nothing can keep us apart. So remember your people, remember your children, remember your promise, O God.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
